---
title: "Climate Data Processing with Mesh Climatology 2020"
---

[日本語版はこちら (Japanese version)](index_ja.qmd)

This documentation explains how to process climate variables using the Japan Meteorological Agency's [Mesh Climatology 2020](https://www.data.jma.go.jp/stats/etrn/view/atlas.html).

## About the data

::: {.callout-note}
For an overview of Mesh Climatology 2020, see the [JMA press release](https://www.jma.go.jp/jma/press/2204/04a/mesh2020.html).
:::

This project uses the National Land Numerical Information (MLIT) [Average Value Mesh Data](https://nlftp.mlit.go.jp/ksj/gml/datalist/KsjTmplt-G02-v3_0.html).

This repository does not redistribute original or processed datasets. Please download required data on your own.

Please review the [NLNI terms of use](https://nlftp.mlit.go.jp/ksj/other/agreement.html), especially the source attribution requirement.

## Package management

This repository uses [renv](https://rstudio.github.io/renv/) for R package dependency management.
After cloning, run `renv::restore()` to reproduce the package environment.

If you do not use renv, install required packages manually.
